name: Expansion Market
description: Full trader system with configurable markets, dynamic pricing, and trading zones.
overview: Expansion Market adds a complete trading system to DayZ. Server owners can create trader NPCs, define item catalogs with prices, set up safe trading zones, and configure dynamic pricing based on supply and demand. The market supports multiple currencies, categories, and trader locations.
installation: Add to your -mod= parameter after Core.
Configure trader zones, items, and pricing.
Set up trader NPC positions in the world.

troubleshooting.solution: Verify trader position files have correct coordinates and the trader object is spawned in the map.
Check market category files for correct price thresholds.

useCases.title: Static Economy
useCases.description: Disable dynamic pricing for predictable, fixed item prices.

useCases.title: Player-Driven Economy
useCases.description: Enable dynamic pricing with high fluctuation for a realistic economy.

quickSettings.name: Enabled
quickSettings.description: Enable or disable the market system.

quickSettings.name: MaxItemsPerTrader
quickSettings.description: Maximum items a single trader can list.

quickSettings.name: PriceFluctuation
quickSettings.description: Maximum price change percentage per cycle (0.0-1.0).

quickSettings.name: MaxBankBalance
quickSettings.description: Maximum amount a player can store in the bank.

useCases.title: Static Economy
useCases.description: Disable dynamic pricing for predictable, fixed item prices.

useCases.title: Player-Driven Economy
useCases.description: Enable dynamic pricing with high fluctuation for a realistic economy.
